provenance: value-blind schema computation; no execution oracle
interpretation: PRIMARY (genuine measurement): the structural systemic term is LIVE — 31.3% of 900 prefix/suffix splits carry boundary_fee>0 (an obstruction in the composition but no local piece; max 4, mean 0.37), so per-link bonds are insufficient on ~31% of real cuts. It is computable ex-ante and non-trivially non-zero, but structurally SMALL on today's simple corpus (a few obstruction dimensions, NOT a dollar cascade); 'grows as the corpus complexifies' is a grounded extrapolation, not shown here. F2 (well-formed 300/300) and F3 (DFD 300/300) are REGIME CONFIRMATIONS, NOT adversarial falsifications: real-MCP is well-formed (consistent with the 967/967 claim; the ~40% ill-formed finding was a different broad-API population) and DFD-holding (consistent with V2 45/45), so these regimes are not reached by real-MCP chains.
